waves.summary: packages/core: telemetry.db separado (open path no modulo store) + schema reduzido de claude_code_otel (metric,model,session_id,sum,updated_at) + spans movido p/ telemetry.db + helper ATTACH p/ join spans<->events + migracao (agrega otel existente, copia spans, dropa de mustard.db, VACUUM)
apps/rt: coletor OTLP escreve no telemetry.db; upsert_metric/upsert_log gravam no schema reduzido (sem minuto/token_type/attrs/count); record_span grava spans no telemetry.db
apps/dashboard + core economy reader: telemetry.rs/db.rs/economy reader leem do telemetry.db; queries de spans usam ATTACH (tel.spans JOIN main.events); preservar todas as medicoes mapeadas
